title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to build a multi-agent AI travel planning system using LangGraph. The system coordinates four specialized agents (flight, hotel, itinerary, and response) that leverage Llama 3.3 70B via Groq, PostgreSQL for memory management, and real-time APIs for flight and hotel data.
